zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV於1392年8月29日出生在英國貝德福爾奧德爾時，他的父親Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III61歲，母親Margaret De Longeville72歲。他於大約1393年與Alainore de Saint Amand結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年之後在英國貝德福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV于1392年8月29日出生在英国貝德福爾奧德爾时，他的父亲Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III61岁，母亲Margaret De Longeville72岁。他于大约1393年与Alainore de Saint Amand结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1429年之后在英国貝德福爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braybrooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV was born on 29 August 1392, in Odell, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III, was 61 and his mother, Margaret De Longeville, was 72. He married Alainore de Saint Amand about 1393. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 1429, in Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV est né le 29 août 1392, à Odell, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Longeville, avait 72 ans. Il a épousé Alainore de Saint Amand environ 1393. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1429, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV am 29. August 1392 in Odell, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III 61 und seine Mutter Margaret De Longeville 72. Er hat um 1393 Alainore de Saint Amand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1429 in Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV è nato il il 29 agosto 1392 nel Odell, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Margaret De Longeville, aveva 72 anni. Lui sposato Alainore de Saint Amand circa 1393. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1429, nel Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IVが1392年8月29日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアオデルで生まれた時，父Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IIIは61歳，母Margaret De Longevilleは72歳であった。約1393年にAlainore de Saint Amandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年以後にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV(이)가 1392년 8월 29일 영국 베드퍼드실르 오데에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Longeville(은)는 72세였다. 그는 대략 1393년 Alainore de Saint Amand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 이후 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 사망했다.

mn.Of, Charles, Devonshire, England: Charles, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV nasceu em 29 de agosto de 1392, em Odell, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Longeville, tinha 72 anos. Ele casou-se com Alainore de Saint Amand aproximadamente 1393. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1429, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV родился 29 августа 1392 г. в местности оделл, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Longeville, 72. Он женился на женщине по имени Alainore de Saint Amand около 1393 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1429 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gerard de Braybrooke IV nació el 29 de agosto de 1392, en Odell, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Margaret De Longeville, tenía 72 años. Se casó con Alainore de Saint Amand aproximadamente 1393. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1429, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
